narrative:
11 Ohio House district has 87,491 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.9% D−R vs -16.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
